## Summary

Refactors the csvg (compressed scalable-vector serialization) module. No visual output.
Updates msgsvg utility wrapper used in build pipeline.

## Changes

- csvg encoder: fix off-by-one in bit packing
- msgsvg wrapper: update flags for new encoder API

## Test plan

QA-Verification: ran unit tests — csvg_test.go and msgsvg_test.go both green (12 cases).
